MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARY PORTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken Off calendar. Case dismissed on February 9, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
